testcase.name: verifyAddEmployee
testcase.system-out: URL after login = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/dashboard/index After PIM Click URL = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/pim/viewEmployeeList Current URL in Add Employee = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/pim/viewEmployeeList After clicking Add URL after Add Click = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/pim/addEmployee Clicked Save Employee Added Successfully URL After Save = https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/pim/viewPersonalDetails/empNumber/261

testcase.name: verifyDeleteEmployee

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //i[contains(@class,'bi-trash')] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//i[contains(@class,'bi-trash')]"}.
